title: rosa × odorata var. odorata
intro: Rosa × odorata var. odorata, also known as the Chinese rose, is a fragrant and flowering plant species in the rose family, native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The health benefits of Rosa × odorata var. odorata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties, as well as supporting cardiovascular health. Rosa × odorata var. odorata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
